title: Atacama Mining Expansion Replay
description: Completed mining-expansion mission replay with provider, bbox, and prompt provenance attached.
task_text: Detect Atacama open-pit mining expansion and separate persistent bare earth from seasonal vegetation loss.
summary: A provenance-focused replay for open-pit mining review, using seeded Sentinel-2 frames and a compact alert packet.

alerts.timelapse_analysis: The Atacama sequence keeps arid terrain stable while the open-pit footprint and access/tailings surfaces remain the focus of review.
alerts.analysis_summary: The replay is useful for provenance training because the source, capture window, bbox, and mission prompt stay attached to the mining output JSON.
alerts.satellite_note: Orbital triage detected persistent bare-earth expansion at the open-pit target.
alerts.ground_note: Ground review keeps this as an auditable mining-expansion packet with explicit provenance.
alerts.ground_action: CONFIRM — mining expansion candidate is ready for provenance-bound review JSON.
findings: Open-pit and tailings surfaces are visible across the sequence
Bare-earth context is persistent rather than a seasonal vegetation artifact
